calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-16-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by Zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator.
Christopher Wilson appeared by Zoom for Approved Inheritance.

The Court stated that the Probate Examiner had raised some issues with respect to the assignments, that it seems that the individual (Anthony) signed the documents with his eyes wide open and that it sees no reason to interfere with his decision. Ms. Mannion stated that she has no issue with the Court going forward with the accounting and that from the beginning Anthony did not want to wait for his distribution. The Court granted the First Account and Report of Administrator, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2020 Continued To Sep-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order
